creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to ykla from comment #12)

FYI until you make  your own bugzilla entry . . .

I did:

# dd if=FreeBSD-14.0-ALPHA2-arm64-aarch64-RPI-20230818-77013f29d048-264841.img of=/dev/da0 bs=1m conv=fsync,sync status=progress
  5294260224 bytes (5294 MB, 5049 MiB) transferred 21.063s, 251 MB/s
5120+0 records in
5120+0 records out
5368709120 bytes transferred in 21.419951 secs (250640584 bytes/sec)

and plugged the media into a 8 GiByte RPi4B Rev 1.5 and powered
it on. HDMI was already connected to a monitor via the connection
nearest to the USB-C power connection.

It booted fine and the video is working. No "rainbow screen".

FYI (captured via a serial console):

# uname -apKU
FreeBSD generic 14.0-ALPHA2 FreeBSD 14.0-ALPHA2 aarch64 1400094 #0 main-n264841-77013f29d048: Fri Aug 18 14:01:51 UTC 2023     root@releng1.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/arm64.aarch64/sys/GENERIC arm64 aarch64 1400094 1400094

# strings /boot/efi/u-boot.bin | grep "U-Boot 20"
U-Boot 2023.07.02 (Aug 18 2023 - 09:39:38 +0000)

(So the U-Boot is not old.)

# strings /boot/efi/start4.elf | grep VC_BUILD_ID_
VC_BUILD_ID_USER: dom
VC_BUILD_ID_TIME: 10:50:39
VC_BUILD_ID_VARIANT: start
VC_BUILD_ID_TIME: Mar 17 2023
VC_BUILD_ID_BRANCH: bcm2711_2
VC_BUILD_ID_HOSTNAME: buildbot
VC_BUILD_ID_PLATFORM: raspberrypi_linux
VC_BUILD_ID_VERSION: 82f3750a65fadae9a38077e3c2e217ad158c8d54 (clean)

(So the RPi* firmware is also not old.)

I do recommend overriding the "hdmi_safe=1" that is in FreeBSD's
default config.txt . I show the default config.txt below.

# more /boot/efi/config.txt 
[all]
arm_64bit=1
dtparam=audio=on,i2c_arm=on,spi=on
dtoverlay=mmc
dtoverlay=disable-bt
device_tree_address=0x4000
kernel=u-boot.bin

[pi4]
hdmi_safe=1
armstub=armstub8-gic.bin
